title: ebenus andersonii
intro: Ebenus andersonii, also known as the Spiny Broom or Thorny Broom, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, providing relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
